prophecies.q: Q的首条帖子：希拉里即将被捕
prophecies.a: 「希拉里·克林顿将于2017年10月30日上午被引渡。届时将引发大规模骚乱，国民警卫队已在多个主要城市部署。」
prophecies.q_en: Q's first post: Hillary's imminent arrest
prophecies.a_en: "Hillary Clinton will be arrested between 7:45 AM – 8:30 AM EST on Monday – the morning of Oct 30, 2017. Massive civil unrest will follow, and the National Guard has been deployed in major cities."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2017年10月30日，希拉里·克林顿未被逮捕。此后至今她从未被逮捕或起诉。没有任何大规模骚乱发生，国民警卫队也未因此部署。这是Q发布的第一条帖子（Q drop #1），也是最早被证伪的核心预测。
prophecies.verdict_en: Hillary Clinton was not arrested on October 30, 2017, nor has she been arrested or indicted at any point since. No mass civil unrest occurred, and no National Guard deployment was made. This was Q's very first post (Q drop #1) and the earliest core prediction to be falsified.

prophecies.q: 约翰·波德斯塔即将被起诉
prophecies.a: 「约翰·波德斯塔将于11月3日被起诉，届时会引发大规模行动。」
prophecies.a_en: "John Podesta will be indicted on November 3, and it will trigger a massive actionable event."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 约翰·波德斯塔（希拉里竞选主席）从未被起诉或逮捕。2017年11月3日没有发生任何「大规模行动」。此预测来自Q drop #14。
prophecies.verdict_en: John Podesta (Hillary's campaign chairman) was never indicted or arrested. No 'massive actionable event' occurred on November 3, 2017. This prediction came from Q drop #14.

prophecies.q: 胡玛·阿贝丁即将被起诉
prophecies.a: 「胡玛·阿贝丁将于11月6日被起诉。」
prophecies.a_en: "Huma Abedin will be indicted on November 6."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 胡玛·阿贝丁（希拉里长期助手）从未被起诉或逮捕。此预测来自Q drop #15，与波德斯塔的预测同日发布。
prophecies.verdict_en: Huma Abedin (Hillary's longtime aide) was never indicted or arrested. This prediction came from Q drop #15, posted the same day as the Podesta prediction.

prophecies.a: 「一场大规模逮捕行动（'风暴'）即将到来，数千名深层政府成员、政客和名人将被拘捕，并在军事法庭受审。已有数万份密封起诉书准备就绪。」
prophecies.a_en: "A massive wave of arrests ('The Storm') is coming. Thousands of deep state members, politicians, and celebrities will be detained and tried in military tribunals. Tens of thousands of sealed indictments are ready."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 「风暴」是QAnon运动最核心的预言，从2017年至2021年被反复推迟。没有任何大规模逮捕行动发生。所谓的「密封起诉书」实际上是美国司法系统中的常规法律文件，每年都有大量存在，与阴谋论无关。截至2026年，「风暴」从未到来。
prophecies.verdict_en: 'The Storm' was QAnon's central prediction, repeatedly deferred from 2017 through 2021. No mass arrests ever occurred. The 'sealed indictments' were routine legal filings in the U.S. court system, which exist in large numbers every year and have no connection to the conspiracy theory. As of 2026, 'The Storm' never arrived.

prophecies.q: 约翰·麦凯恩受军事法庭审判
prophecies.a: 「约翰·麦凯恩并非死于脑癌，而是因叛国罪在军事法庭受审后被秘密处决。Q在麦凯恩去世前一个月准确预测了死亡时间。」
prophecies.a_en: "John McCain did not die of brain cancer but was secretly executed after a military tribunal for treason. Q predicted the timing of his death one month before."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 约翰·麦凯恩于2018年8月25日因胶质母细胞瘤（脑癌）去世，享年81岁。他的病情自2017年7月确诊后即为公开信息，病情持续恶化符合该疾病的已知进程。没有任何证据表明存在军事法庭或秘密处决。Q追随者认为Q「预测」了死亡时间，但麦凯恩当时已处于临终关怀阶段，去世时间并非不可预见。
prophecies.verdict_en: John McCain died on August 25, 2018, of glioblastoma (brain cancer) at age 81. His diagnosis had been public since July 2017, and his declining health was consistent with the known progression of the disease. There is no evidence of a military tribunal or secret execution. Q followers claimed Q 'predicted' the death timing, but McCain was already in hospice care, making his passing foreseeable.

prophecies.a: 「特朗普总统正在秘密执行一项计划，与军方合作，从内部瓦解深层政府。一切都在掌控之中。信任计划。」
prophecies.a_en: "President Trump is secretly executing a plan, working with the military to dismantle the deep state from within. Everything is under control. Trust the Plan."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 特朗普在2017-2021年总统任期内没有发起任何针对所谓「深层政府」的系统性行动。没有大规模逮捕，没有军事法庭，没有「深层政府」被瓦解的迹象。特朗普于2021年1月20日正常卸任，权力和平交接给拜登。
prophecies.verdict_en: During Trump's 2017-2021 presidency, no systematic action against the alleged 'deep state' was initiated. There were no mass arrests, no military tribunals, and no signs of the 'deep state' being dismantled. Trump left office normally on January 20, 2021, with power peacefully transferred to Biden.

prophecies.a: 「关塔那摩湾拘留中心正在扩建，以容纳即将被逮捕的深层政府要员。军事法庭将在此进行。」
prophecies.a_en: "Guantanamo Bay detention facility is being expanded to house deep state figures who will be arrested. Military tribunals will be held there."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 关塔那摩湾未进行任何针对美国政客的军事法庭审判。拘留中心确实在2018年进行了一些设施翻新，但这是常规维护，与QAnon的说法无关。截至2026年，关塔那摩仍关押着少量反恐战争中的囚犯，没有任何美国政治人物被送往该处。
prophecies.verdict_en: No military tribunals for U.S. politicians were held at Guantanamo Bay. The detention facility did undergo some renovations in 2018, but these were routine maintenance unrelated to QAnon claims. As of 2026, Guantanamo still holds a small number of War on Terror detainees, and no American political figures have been sent there.

prophecies.a: 「特朗普将宣布戒严令，接管政府运作，军方将负责执行大规模逮捕行动。紧急广播系统将启动。」
prophecies.a_en: "Trump will declare martial law, take over government operations, and the military will carry out mass arrests. The Emergency Broadcast System will be activated."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 特朗普从未宣布戒严令。2020年大选后，尽管他对选举结果提出质疑，但联邦法院驳回了60多项相关诉讼。紧急广播系统未被启动。2021年1月20日，权力正常移交给拜登总统。
prophecies.verdict_en: Trump never declared martial law. After the 2020 election, despite his challenges to the results, federal courts dismissed over 60 related lawsuits. The Emergency Broadcast System was not activated. On January 20, 2021, power was transferred normally to President Biden.

prophecies.a: 「深层政府的犯罪网络将被彻底瓦解。CIA、FBI和DOJ中的腐败官员将被清除。」
prophecies.a_en: "The deep state criminal network will be completely dismantled. Corrupt officials within the CIA, FBI, and DOJ will be purged."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 在特朗普第一任期内（2017-2021），CIA、FBI和DOJ均继续正常运作。虽然有部分高级官员被解职或辞职（如FBI局长科米、副局长麦凯布），但这些是正常的政治人事变动，并非Q所描述的系统性「清洗」行动。没有任何犯罪网络被揭露或瓦解。
prophecies.verdict_en: During Trump's first term (2017-2021), the CIA, FBI, and DOJ continued to function normally. While some senior officials were fired or resigned (e.g., FBI Director Comey, Deputy Director McCabe), these were routine political personnel changes, not the systematic 'purge' described by Q. No criminal network was exposed or dismantled.

prophecies.q: 罗伯特·穆勒实际上在帮助特朗普
prophecies.a: 「特别检察官穆勒的'通俄门'调查实际上是与特朗普合作，秘密调查深层政府和民主党的犯罪行为。穆勒是一名爱国者。」
prophecies.a_en: "Special Counsel Mueller's 'Russia investigation' is actually cooperating with Trump to secretly investigate the deep state and Democratic crimes. Mueller is a patriot."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 穆勒调查于2019年3月结束，最终报告并未指控任何民主党人或「深层政府」成员。调查确认了俄罗斯干预2016年大选的事实，对特朗普竞选团队多名成员提出起诉（包括保罗·马纳福特、迈克尔·弗林等）。穆勒从未被证明是在与特朗普合作。
prophecies.verdict_en: The Mueller investigation concluded in March 2019. The final report did not charge any Democrats or 'deep state' members. It confirmed Russian interference in the 2016 election and indicted several Trump campaign members (including Paul Manafort and Michael Flynn). Mueller was never shown to have been cooperating with Trump.

prophecies.a: 「随着真相的揭露，全球将迎来一场大规模的意识觉醒（The Great Awakening）。民众将认清深层政府和主流媒体的谎言。」
prophecies.a_en: "As the truth is revealed, the world will experience a Great Awakening. People will see through the lies of the deep state and mainstream media."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 「大觉醒」作为QAnon定义的事件（深层政府被揭露、大规模逮捕后民众恍然大悟）并未发生。但QAnon运动本身确实在2019-2021年间经历了大规模扩张，吸引了全球数百万追随者，对美国政治产生了实质性影响。多名QAnon支持者当选国会议员。在这个意义上，一场「觉醒」确实发生了，只是方向与Q所描述的完全不同。
prophecies.verdict_en: The 'Great Awakening' as defined by QAnon (deep state exposed, mass arrests followed by public revelation) did not occur. However, the QAnon movement itself experienced massive expansion during 2019-2021, attracting millions of followers worldwide and having a tangible impact on American politics. Several QAnon supporters were elected to Congress. In this sense, an 'awakening' did occur, just in a completely different direction than Q described.

prophecies.q: 密封起诉书证明大规模逮捕即将到来
prophecies.a: 「联邦法院系统中存在数万份密封起诉书，远超历史正常水平。这些起诉书是为即将到来的大规模逮捕行动准备的。」
prophecies.q_en: Sealed indictments prove mass arrests coming
prophecies.a_en: "There are tens of thousands of sealed indictments in the federal court system, far exceeding historical norms. These indictments are being prepared for the coming mass arrests."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 美国联邦法院系统中确实存在大量密封法律文件，QAnon追随者统计称超过20万份。但法律专家指出，这些「密封起诉书」的统计方法存在严重错误：统计者将所有密封法庭文件（包括搜查令、传票、和解协议等）都算作「起诉书」，实际起诉书只占很小比例。此外，密封文件数量的增长反映了联邦案件整体增加的趋势，并非异常现象。没有大规模逮捕行动发生。
prophecies.verdict_en: Large numbers of sealed legal documents do exist in the federal court system; QAnon followers claimed over 200,000. However, legal experts noted severe methodological flaws: the count included all sealed court filings (search warrants, subpoenas, settlement agreements, etc.), not just indictments. The growth in sealed filings reflected an overall increase in federal cases, not an anomaly. No mass arrests occurred.

prophecies.a: 「2018年中期选举将出现共和党大胜的'红色浪潮'。选举结果将证明特朗普的计划正在奏效。」
prophecies.a_en: "The 2018 midterm elections will produce a Republican 'Red Wave'. The election results will prove Trump's plan is working."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2018年中期选举结果与Q的预测相反：民主党在众议院净增40个席位，重新夺回众议院多数地位。共和党仅在参议院小幅增加了2个席位。这被普遍认为是对特朗普执政的「蓝色浪潮」反弹。
prophecies.verdict_en: The 2018 midterm results were the opposite of Q's prediction: Democrats gained a net 40 seats in the House, reclaiming the majority. Republicans only gained 2 Senate seats. This was widely regarded as a 'Blue Wave' backlash against the Trump administration.

prophecies.a: 「2020年大选中，特朗普将以压倒性优势获胜。深层政府的阴谋将被挫败。信任计划。」
prophecies.a_en: "In the 2020 election, Trump will win by a landslide. The deep state plot will be foiled. Trust the Plan."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2020年大选中，拜登以306比232的选举人票和超过700万张普选票的优势击败特朗普。特朗普团队在多个州提出的选举诉讼被法院驳回（超过60起案件败诉），包括最高法院。联邦选举安全官员称2020年大选是「美国历史上最安全的选举」。
prophecies.verdict_en: In the 2020 election, Biden defeated Trump with 306 to 232 electoral votes and over 7 million more popular votes. Election lawsuits filed by the Trump team were dismissed by courts in multiple states (over 60 cases lost), including the Supreme Court. Federal election security officials called it 'the most secure election in American history'.

prophecies.q: 1月6日之后：特朗普将重返权力
prophecies.a: 「即使拜登就职，特朗普仍在幕后掌控局面。军方支持特朗普，他将在适当时候重返权力。3月4日（原宪法规定的就职日）是关键日期。」
prophecies.q_en: After January 6: Trump will return to power
prophecies.a_en: "Even after Biden's inauguration, Trump remains in control behind the scenes. The military supports Trump, and he will return to power at the appropriate time. March 4 (the original constitutional inauguration date) is the key date."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 拜登于2021年1月20日正式就职，完全行使总统权力。3月4日没有发生任何特殊事件。此后QAnon社群不断将「特朗普回归」的日期后移，但均未应验。特朗普以普通公民身份离开白宫，直到2024年再次竞选。
prophecies.verdict_en: Biden was inaugurated on January 20, 2021, and exercised full presidential authority. Nothing happened on March 4. The QAnon community repeatedly moved the goalposts for Trump's 'return,' but none materialized. Trump left the White House as a private citizen until running again in 2024.

prophecies.a: 「当真相大白之日到来，主流媒体将因长期欺骗民众而信誉崩塌。人们将转向替代媒体获取真实信息。」
prophecies.a_en: "When the truth is revealed, mainstream media will lose all credibility for deceiving the public. People will turn to alternative media for real information."
prophecies.verdict_zh: Q所描述的「真相大白」事件未发生，主流媒体并未因此崩溃。但美国社会对主流媒体的信任度确实持续下降：盖洛普2024年调查显示，仅31%的美国人信任大众媒体，创历史新低。替代媒体和社交平台（如Substack、Rumble、Truth Social）的影响力显著增长。虽然原因复杂（政治极化、社交媒体兴起等），不能归因于Q的预言，但趋势方向部分吻合。
prophecies.verdict_en: The 'truth revealed' event Q described never occurred, and mainstream media did not collapse because of it. However, trust in mainstream media has indeed declined: Gallup's 2024 survey showed only 31% of Americans trust mass media, a historic low. Alternative media and social platforms (Substack, Rumble, Truth Social) gained significant influence. While the causes are complex (political polarization, social media rise), the directional trend partially aligns.

prophecies.q: 全球精英的恋童癖网络将被揭露
prophecies.a: 「一个由全球精英运营的大规模恋童癖犯罪网络将被揭露。这是深层政府的核心秘密。」
prophecies.q_en: Elite pedophile network to be exposed
prophecies.a_en: "A massive pedophile criminal network run by global elites will be exposed. This is the deep state's core secret."
prophecies.verdict_zh: Q所描述的与政治权力机构直接挂钩的系统性犯罪网络未被证实。但2019年杰弗里·爱泼斯坦案件的曝光确实揭示了一个涉及多名权贵人物的性犯罪网络。爱泼斯坦于2019年8月在狱中死亡（官方裁定自杀），其同伙吉斯兰·麦克斯韦于2021年被定罪。此案虽与Q描述的「深层政府阴谋」不同，但确实涉及精英阶层的性犯罪问题。
prophecies.verdict_en: The systematic criminal network directly tied to political power structures as described by Q was not confirmed. However, the 2019 Jeffrey Epstein case did reveal a sex trafficking network involving multiple prominent figures. Epstein died in prison in August 2019 (ruled suicide); his associate Ghislaine Maxwell was convicted in 2021. While different from Q's 'deep state conspiracy,' it did involve elite sex crimes.
